text: Hey team, auth migration is green-lit for March 20. Security review passed. Please make sure your feature branches are rebased before the cutover.
Nice! I'll have the PostgreSQL migration ready by then too. We can do both in the same maintenance window to minimize downtime.
Frontend is ready. The new Clerk components are behind a feature flag. I can flip it during the cutover window.

Perfect. Deployment plan: 1) Enable maintenance page, 2) Run PostgreSQL migration, 3) Switch auth provider to Clerk, 4) Flip frontend feature flag, 5) Smoke test, 6) Disable maintenance page. Estimated total downtime: 30 minutes.
I'll be on call during the cutover. Rollback plan: revert the auth config and re-enable Auth0. PostgreSQL migration is backward-compatible so no rollback needed there.
